title: report
text: report A Uniface presentation component that defines the content and layout of printed output of a Uniface application. It can be run locally or remotely, but it cannot be displayed on screen, or update the database. Related Links Reports Reports are components for generating output—they have no user interface and cannot update the database. They make use of headers, footers, and break frames to format data and control printing. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
